projectDescription: A MediaWiki extension that adds OCR text extraction, multi-format book export (EPUB, MOBI, PDF), and Wikibase edition linking features to Wikisource.
keyFeatures: Single-page OCR with Tesseract, Google Vision, and Transkribus engines
Bulk OCR for mass transcription of untranscribed Index pages
Book export to EPUB, MOBI, and PDF via WS Export tool
Sidebar and article header download buttons
Per-user OCR preferences with language/model selection
Onboarding popup for first-time OCR users
publicApiSurface: SidebarBeforeOutput hook — adds export links to page sidebar
ArticleViewHeader hook — adds download button to article header
EditPage::showEditForm:initial hook — injects OCR toolbar into page editor
GetPreferences hook — adds OCR user preferences
BeforePageDisplay hook — loads Bulk OCR module on Index pages for admins
WikibaseClientSiteLinksForItem hook — provides site links for Wikibase items
EditionLookup::getWorks(Item) — finds works for a given edition
EditionLookup::getEditions(Item) — finds editions for a given work
WsExport::getExportUrl(Title, format) — generates export URL for a page
OcrTool::extractText() — triggers OCR text extraction for the current page
BulkOcrWidget::executeBulkOcr() — runs batch OCR on untranscribed index pages
$wgWikisourceEnableOcr — enables or disables the OCR feature
$wgWikisourceEnableBulkOcr — enables or disables the Bulk OCR feature
$wgWikisourceOcrUrl — sets the base URL for the OCR service
$wgWikisourceWsExportUrl — sets the base URL for the WS Export service
$wgWikisourceTranskribusModels — defines Transkribus HTR models per wiki
